name: Jewish Cookie
recipeInstructions:
1) Cream together the sugar, 1/2 cup margarine, and eggs. Add flour and 3 tablespoons cocoa. Fold in nuts.
2) Spread evenly on a greased cookie sheet measuring 12x15 inches (ungreased).
3) Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes.
4) Mix coconut with sweetened condensed milk and spread over the hot cake. Return to oven and bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for an additional 15 minutes. Cool and frost.
5) Frosting: Mix together 3 tablespoons cocoa, 2 tablespoons margarine, and powdered sugar. Add milk until the mixture reaches a spreading consistency.
